opus-baseline.description: Current approach: Opus, no hints, standard prompt

sonnet-baseline.description: Same prompt but Sonnet -- tests if cheaper model is good enough

sonnet-with-hints.description: Sonnet with Haiku summary hints -- can hints compensate for smaller model?

opus-with-hints.description: Opus with Haiku summary hints -- does giving hints improve accuracy?

opus-v2.description: assess-v2 two-axis + blocks, per-opinion packed, no hints

opus-v2-hints.description: assess-v2 with Haiku prescreen hints (SS6.7 A/B arm)

sonnet-v2.description: assess-v2 on Sonnet -- cost/accuracy vs opus-v2 (old v1 data: sonnet 53/61 ~= opus 54/61, so promising)

sonnet-v1.description: assess-v1 single-claim on Sonnet -- is the cheap model fine on the simpler prompt? (old v1 data: sonnet 53/61 ~ opus 54/61)
